fixture.title: Catalog Crawler VNDB Replay Fixture
fixture.summary: Synthetic recorded crawler steps for deterministic checkpoint, rate-limit, and replay verification without live network access.

license.evidence: Hand-authored synthetic request identities, payloads, and normalized facts; no third-party raw assets or private credentials.

provenance.creationMethod: Hand-authored synthetic VNDB-shaped crawler replay bundle for CATALOG-005 verification.

aggregateStats.notes: Covers two recorded public crawler steps with fetched-at timestamps, request identities, source/parser versions supplied by the adapter, checkpoint cursors, and rate-limit metadata; it contains no live VNDB payload or credential material.
